simplesect.para: True when the operation succeeds; otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Converts device depth to linear depth on CPU.
Checks whether sample adaptive focus distance.

simplesect.para: True when the operation succeeds; otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Returns the debug adaptive center valid.

simplesect.para: True when the operation succeeds; otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Returns the debug adaptive center distance.
Returns the debug adaptive ray valid.

simplesect.para: True when the operation succeeds; otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Returns the debug adaptive ray distance.
Returns the debug adaptive used fallback.

simplesect.para: True when the operation succeeds; otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Returns the debug adaptive target distance.
Returns the debug adaptive fallback distance.

memberdef.argsstring: (PTexture tex, PTexture depthTex, PFrameBuffer outFbo, std::shared_ptr< ModelPart > quad) override
memberdef.name: apply

simplesect.para: True when the operation succeeds; otherwise false.
